message:
test(proptest): add 30 property tests for fleet_launcher query surface (ft-3681t.3.1.1)

Extends proptest_fleet_launcher.rs with serde roundtrip and invariant
property tests for the new query-surface types and methods added in
d853d1be: ProgramDistribution, MetadataProjectionFailure,
RegistrySummary, FleetLaunchError, plus LaunchPlan query methods
(programs, program_distribution, slots_in_phase, slot, phase_labels,
invariant_violations) and LaunchOutcome query methods
(registry_summary, successful/failed/skipped_outcomes, is_complete).

All 51 tests pass (21 existing + 30 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
